matched_comparators.name: Raw OCR text prompt
matched_comparators.notes: No sanitization is applied after OCR extraction.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + regex masking
matched_comparators.notes: Mask numeric identifiers and field-style patterns with OCR-text regexes only.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + generic de-identification
matched_comparators.notes: Mask regex hits plus form-like answer text around common field labels without layout routing.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + Presidio form de-identification
matched_comparators.notes: Use a real Presidio recognizer stack plus form-specific recognizers and value-span expansion on OCR text.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + spaCy form de-identification
matched_comparators.notes: Use a spaCy NER stack plus form-value expansion on OCR text.

matched_comparators.name: Proposed multimodal mediation
matched_comparators.notes: Mask likely answer/value regions with OCR-line and layout-aware heuristics while preserving form labels.

mapping_notes: FUNSD answer-field spans are treated as the protected privacy-bearing slice, while question/header tokens remain utility-carrying context.
Gold spans are matched to OCR detections via box overlap so evaluation stays grounded in the OCR transcript rather than in source token offsets.
The same declared RapidOCR runtime is reused here to form a second public OCR rerun under one documented OCR stack.
